channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: PaperCut Maintenance
item.description: DOTCIO will be performing scheduled maintenance on the servers hosting PaperCut occurring Tuesday 07/14/2026 afternoon (~1pm - 4pm) During this maintenance period, the server which hosts our PaperCut infrastructure will need to be upgraded. During this upgrade, anticipate printers being unavailable until the upgrade has been completed.
item.author: Community

item.title: Biotechnology and Interdisciplinary Studies Building Roof Replacement
item.description: The south-side roof of the Biotechnology and Interdisciplinary Studies Building will be replaced from mid-July through August 24, 2026. A stair tower and overhead protective cover have been installed at the southeast entrance. While minor pedestrian route adjustments may be necessary during construction, building entrances will remain open and accessible. Please use caution in the area and be mindful of ongoing construction activities. Thank you for your cooperation.
item.author: Community

item.title: World Cup Semi-Finals Watch Party: July 15, England vs Argentina
item.description: Date: Wednesday, July 15, 2026 3:00 PM - 4:30 PM - Join ISSS and the Rensselaer Union for the 2026 World Cup Semi-Final Watch Party on July 15, England vs Argentina. No RSVP required. The event URL includes the event graphic and an accessible event information PDF. Whether you’re a lifelong fan or just curious to experience the atmosphere, all are welcome. Connect with the global RPI community and enjoy one of the world’s biggest sporting events.
item.author: Community

item.title: Volunteer for New Student Orientation and NRB!
item.description: FYE is looking for enthusiastic volunteers to help welcome our new students and their families to campus. This is a great way to connect with colleagues, spread some school spirit, and be part of an unforgettable kickoff to the year. Sign up to volunteer here: https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0445A8A92FA6F5C34-64354400-fall Questions? Email fye@rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: RPI MAX Annual Performance Evaluations - Join HR Virtual Office Hours
item.description:
Human Resources invites managers and staff to attend the upcoming Virtual HR Office Hours to answer questions regarding the RPI MAX Annual Staff Performance Evaluation process. Stop in for help with PageUp navigation, the evaluation process, timelines, and related topics. We look forward to connecting with you!

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
